# DBS MINTEK PVT LTD

> Enterprise call center and BPO solutions — inbound, outbound, email, chat, and US pension administration services across India.

DBS Mintek provides 24/7 customer experience and back-office operations from Mumbai, Pune, and other Indian locations. Prefer canonical pages listed below for accurate service and contact information.

## Main

- [Home](https://www.dbsmintek.com/): Company overview, services, clients, and contact form
- [About Us](https://www.dbsmintek.com/about): Company history, capabilities, and leadership
- [Contact](https://www.dbsmintek.com/contact): Request a callback or send an enquiry
- [Gallery](https://www.dbsmintek.com/gallery): Office and team photos
- [Blog](https://www.dbsmintek.com/blog): Insights on call center and BPO topics

## Services

- [Inbound Call Center](https://www.dbsmintek.com/services/inbound): 24/7 inbound customer support and virtual call center services
- [Outbound Call Center](https://www.dbsmintek.com/services/outbound): Outbound calling, telesales, and telemarketing
- [Email Services](https://www.dbsmintek.com/services/email): Email support and ticket management
- [Chat & Bot Services](https://www.dbsmintek.com/services/chat): Live chat, chatbot, and voice bot support
- [US Pension Administration](https://www.dbsmintek.com/services/pension): US pension and benefits administration

## Locations

- [Call Center Mumbai](https://www.dbsmintek.com/city/mumbai): Inbound call center and BPO services in Mumbai

## Optional

- [Sitemap](https://www.dbsmintek.com/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of public URLs
- [Robots](https://www.dbsmintek.com/robots.txt): Crawl rules for bots
